backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two CORS proxy migration features (switching to allorigins.win) to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the Cheetah 1.0 app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens and base styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Cheetah 1.0 app, loading Puter.js, CodeMirror, Google CSE scripts, and mounting the React app at #root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing page routing, tab state via useTabs, and a panic overlay mode with countdown timer and keyboard shortcut support.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/CodeE: Code editor tab using CodeMirror with support for HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Python, featuring a live iframe preview and localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/Prese: Presentation builder tab with a slide list, per-slide title/body/color editor, keyboard-navigable fullscreen presentation mode, and localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/Websi: A drag-and-drop style website builder tab that lets users add, edit, reorder, and preview HTML components (header, text, image, button) with persistent localStorage state.
frontend/src/components/common/LoadingSp: A simple animated CSS spinner component with configurable size (sm/md/lg) and an optional text label.
frontend/src/components/common/ProxyInfo: An expandable info panel that displays proxy configuration details (CORS proxy routes, etc.) with collapsible sections and a close button.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: The top application header displaying the Cheetah logo, branding, a SECURE status badge, and a panic button with keyboard shortcut support.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: A vertical sidebar navigation component rendering icon+label buttons for all app pages (home, games, AI, code, quickopen, education, proxy) with keyboard shortcut hints.
frontend/src/components/tabs/TabBar.tsx: A horizontal browser-style tab bar that renders open tabs with close buttons and a new-tab button, supporting active tab highlighting.
Renders the content area for a single browser tab, showing an iframe for proxied URLs, an empty-state welcome screen, or an error panel with retry/open-in-new-window options.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts: Generic React hook that synchronizes a state value with localStorage, supporting functional updates and gracefully handling JSON parse/stringify errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder module indicating no backend queries are needed for this frontend-only app.
frontend/src/hooks/useTabs.ts: Hook managing browser-like tab state (create, close, navigate, proxy fallback) with localStorage persistence, including proxy URL generation, TikTok embed detection, and search engine direct-load logic.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining an always-dark amethyst/purple theme using OKLCH CSS variables, Tailwind layers, glassmorphism utilities, animated gradient backgrounds, and custom scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AIAssistant.tsx: AI homework assistant page that sends subject-tagged questions to Puter.js AI, renders markdown-formatted answers, and persists a history of up to 20 Q&A pairs in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/CodeEditorPage.tsx: Page component with three sub-tabs (Code Editor, Presentation Builder, Website Builder) rendered via a styled tab bar, delegating content to their respective child components.
frontend/src/pages/Education.tsx: Renders an education page with a built-in quiz system covering Math, ELA, Science, and other subjects, tracking streaks and scores. Includes a static bank of quiz questions with multiple-choice options, explanations, and subject icons.
frontend/src/pages/Games.tsx: Displays a grid of educational game site cards (e.g., Math Playground, Khan Academy, Scratch) with click handlers that either navigate to an internal page or open an external URL in a new tab.
frontend/src/pages/HomeSearch.tsx: Provides a browser-like home/search page with an address bar, back/forward/refresh controls, and an embedded iframe for displaying proxied web content. Also shows proxy status info and options to retry or open URLs in a new window.
frontend/src/pages/ProxyLinks.tsx: Renders a list of proxy service cards (ProxySite, ProxyOrb, ProxyProxy) with launch buttons that open the selected proxy in the browser, highlighting a primary recommended service.
frontend/src/pages/QuickOpen.tsx: Shows a grid of quick-access cards for popular sites (TikTok, YouTube, Wikipedia, Disney+, ChatGPT, Google Gemini) that open the respective URLs via the proxy when clicked.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with custom fonts (JetBrains Mono, Rajdhani), oklch-based color tokens (amethyst, violet, magenta palettes, sidebar, chart, etc.), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking two existing features: replacing the CORS proxy base URL with allorigins.win in useTabs.ts, and updating hardcoded proxy references in HomeSearch.tsx and TabContent.tsx to match.
